buildroot.external_tree: Buildroot checkout, not vendored in this repository
buildroot.minimum_claim_to_clear_block: external Buildroot build completed and runtime e1-mmio-smoke plus e1-npu-ml-smoke transcripts captured

linux.external_tree: Linux kernel checkout with sw/linux imported under drivers/misc/eliza-e1
linux.source_command: make ARCH=riscv CROSS_COMPILE=riscv64-linux-gnu- Image dtbs modules
linux.minimum_claim_to_clear_block: external Linux kernel build, DTB validation, module artifacts, and runtime smoke transcript captured

opensbi.external_tree: OpenSBI checkout with optional sw/opensbi/platform/eliza imported under platform/eliza
opensbi.source_command: make PLATFORM=generic FW_DYNAMIC=y and an exact external QEMU/Renode/board fw_dynamic handoff command
required_outputs: external boot or simulator UART transcript containing OpenSBI fw_dynamic handoff
opensbi.minimum_claim_to_clear_block: external OpenSBI build and fw_dynamic handoff transcript captured

u-boot.external_tree: U-Boot checkout with Eliza board/device-tree support from the generated AP boot path
u-boot.source_command: ELIZA_UBOOT_CMD='make eliza_defconfig && make' docs/sw/u-boot/capture-u-boot-evidence.sh /path/to/u-boot build; ELIZA_UBOOT_BOOT_CMD='/path/to/qemu-or-renode boot command' docs/sw/u-boot/capture-u-boot-evidence.sh /path/to/u-boot boot-chain
required_outputs: external boot or simulator UART transcript containing OpenSBI handoff into U-Boot
u-boot.minimum_claim_to_clear_block: external U-Boot build and OpenSBI-to-U-Boot boot-chain transcript captured

aosp.external_tree: AOSP checkout with sw/aosp-device imported to device/eliza/eliza_ai_soc
aosp.source_command: source build/envsetup.sh && lunch eliza_ai_soc-userdebug && m vendorimage vendor_sepolicy.cil sepolicy_neverallows && checkvintf
aosp.minimum_claim_to_clear_block: external AOSP lunch, vendorimage, VINTF, SELinux, CTS/VTS scope-intake, and virtual-device smoke transcripts captured without claiming Android boot or Android compatibility
